creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

I've written a patch updating to 2.12.1, which is the latest.
 # http://article.gmane.org/gmane.network.gnutls.general/2289

GnuTLS has chosen Nettle (2.1) as the default crypto back end.
The maintainer of security/nettle says that the ports depend on
security/nettle are not yet ready to go with 2.1
(see also: ports/149361, ports/156173 ).
So, using security/libgcrypt as the default might be appropriate.

IIRC, there are over 90 ports depend on security/gnutls,
it seems to be very hard to maintain the port.
I'd really appreciate if the update available soon.


Regards,
-- 

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp
